data.title: Ethereum treasury company Intchains Group acquired ECHOLINK's PoS technology platform for $1.3 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Ethereum treasury company Intchains Group announced it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire ECHOLINK Limited's Proof-of-Stake (PoS) technology platform for $1.3 million. The platform aims to provide staking services on blockchains such as Ethereum, Avalanche, and Manta for individual and institutional investors. According to Strategicthreserve data, the company currently holds approximately 8,820 Ethereum. (Globenewswire)

data.title: US Housing Market Shows Early Signs of Stabilization in November
data.description:
US housing market stabilizes with lower mortgage rates, rising sales, and more inventory, while home prices hold steady, signaling cautious optimism for buyers and sellers.

data.title: OpenAI’s books are leaking and the numbers don’t add up
data.description:
Internal docs show Microsoft pulled $493. 8 million from OpenAI last year, then $865. 8 million by September 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Won’t Crash To $92,000, Here’s Why
data.description:
The recent Bitcoin price crash below the $100,000 psychological level has fueled a new wave of bearish predictions, yet not everyone is convinced that a deeper decline is imminent. While many traders expect a correction to $92,000, one analyst has rejected the idea of a price breakdown, insisting that Bitcoin still has unfinished upside potential before any significant retracement Why The Bitcoin Price Won’t Decline To $92,000 Crypto analyst @YazanXBT has become one of the loudest voices negating the increasingly popular $92,000 crash target for Bitcoin. The analyst took to X social media on November 13 to inform the crypto community that, rather than a drop to $92,000, BTC is gearing up for a new all-time high of $145,000. Related Reading: Here’s When The Next Bitcoin Parabolic Phase To $297,092 Will Begin The analyst backed up his bullish projection by pointing to a similar moment during BTC’s previous bear market bottom
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-wont-crash-to-92000/

data.title: Founders Fund, founded by Silicon Valley mogul Peter Thiel, has reduced its stake in Bitmine by half, currently holding approximately 2.547 million shares.
data.description: According to filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Founders Fund, a venture capital firm led by billionaire and top Silicon Valley investor Peter Thiel, has sold half of its stake in Bitmine. It currently holds 2,547,001 shares in the company.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Becomes Harvard’s Top Holding After 257% Stake Increase
data.description:
Harvard University increased its Bitcoin ETF position by 257% to $442. 8 million in the third quarter, making it the endowment's top disclosed holding and signaling growing institutional acceptance among elite academic investors.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-etf-becomes-harvards-top-holding-after-257-stake-increase/

data.title: Belarus Prioritizes Crypto Mining Amid Push to Break Dollar Dominance
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/belarus-prioritizes-crypto-mining-amid-push-to-break-dollar-dominance/

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki says cash crunch driving crash, stays bullish on Bitcoin, gold
data.description:

data.title: DOJ targets satellite systems used at scam compound in new warrant
data.description:
The United States Department of Justice (DOJ) has issued a seizure warrant to Starlink over satellite internet systems being used at scam compounds. With these scam compounds intensifying their activities of stealing funds from victims across the world, the United States law enforcement has continued to target their operations. According to a report, these cybercriminals […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/doj-targets-satellite-systems-scam-compound/

data.title: OKX Star: A reward of 10 BTC will be given to anyone who can provide conclusive evidence that OKX Wallet has a backdoor.
data.description: OKX founder and CEO Star posted on the X platform: "Anyone who can provide conclusive evidence that OKX Wallet has a backdoor will be rewarded with 10 BTC by our OKX Wallet team. We ask the tens of millions of OKX Wallet users worldwide to monitor this. Security and transparency are our bottom line, and we welcome community review."

data.title: Michael Saylor Reveals Daily Bitcoin Purchases
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy, announced on social media that his company is purchasing Bitcoin daily this week. Saylor's statement highlights the firm's ongoing commitment to investing in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: $20,062 Abruptly Disappears From Man’s Bank Account, Triggering Confrontation With JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America and Two Insurance Companies: Report
data.description:
JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America and two insurance companies are in the spotlight after a large sum of cash abruptly disappeared from a Chicago man’s bank account. Darryl Armistead received a check of $20,062. 15 from insurance giant Allstate after a hailstorm damaged his house, reports NBC 5 Chicago
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/11/15/20062-abruptly-disappears-from-mans-bank-account-triggering-confrontation-with-jpmorgan-chase-bank-of-america-and-two-insurance-companies-report/
